retention  
  
Appendix 3 - Security Measures   
 
 1. All parties are obliged to clarify the organizational, administrative, technical, and security measures that will be applied to the transferred Personal Data to fulfill the provisions of Article (19) of the Law and Article (23) of the Implementing Regul ation of the Law.  
2
evidence.clean_text: S&P Global has an Information Security Awareness and Training program that trains employees on information security policies and security best practices. All employees are required to take annual computer-based information security training and refresher course(s), which reinforces information security policies and data privacy.
